'''Kyu Tane''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the [[Royal House of Naboo|Naboo]] [[Minister of Culture/Legends|Minister of Culture]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. He and [[Kyu Tane's wife|his wife]] were arrested by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] troops, but their [[Lialla Tane|daughter]] managed to escape and join with the [[Naboo Underground]]. Eventually, Tane, his wife and a group of other prisoners were rescued by agents of the Naboo Underground.

==Appearances==
